nasb.text: We have become like those over whom You have never ruled, Like those who were not called by Your name.

esv.text: We have become like those over whom you have never ruled, like those who are not called by your name.

cnv.text: 我們成了好像你從未治理過的人， 又像未曾得稱為你名下的人。

ccb.text: 我们如此沦落， 好像从未被你治理过， 从来不属于你。

csbs.text: 我们像是自古以来没有被你管辖过的人， 又像是没有被称为你名下的人。
